rulings.Case Title: RICHARD HEVENER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant San Francisco Gravel Company¿S Joinder To Defendant Sherwin-Williams Company¿S Motion To Exclude Expert Opinion Testimony That The Inhalation Of Chrysotile Containing Joint Compound Particulates Caused Plaintiff¿S Colon Cancer
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, September 22, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant San Francisco Gravel Company¿S Joinder To Defendant Sherwin-Williams Company¿s Motion To Exclude Expert Opinion Testimony. Defendant Sherwin-Williams Co.¿s motion to exclude expert opinion testimony that the inhalation of chrysotile containing joint compound particulates caused plaintiff¿s colon cancer is denied without prejudice. The motion is improperly brought as a discovery motion. Defendant may re-file the motion to be heard by the trial judge. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: BILLY S. JOHNSON VS. ADVOCATE MINES, LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Discovery
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, September 22, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Calaveras Asbestos Ltd.¿s motion to compel plaintiff to provide further discovery responses is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)
